name: Against Marvel!
description:
Set in the Marvel Comics universe, you are an overpowered and god-like villain who will fight against The Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy, Defenders and Fantastic 4. Here, you are evil. You Define your own powers and background.

Heroes:

Avengers: Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, Hawkeye, Spider-Man, Black Panther, Namor, Doctor Strange, Scarlet Witch, Deadpool, Vision, Ant-Man, Wasp, Falcon, Winter Soldier, Captain Marvel, Quicksilver, She-Hulk, Moon Knight, War Machine, Sentry, Mar-Vell, Nova, Hercules, Miss Marvel.

Guardians of the Galaxy: Star-Lord, Gamora, Groot, Rocket Raccoon, Drax the Destroyer, Nebula, High Evolutionary, Mantis, Adam Warlock, Moondragon, Dog Cosmo.

Fantastic 4: Mister Fantastic, Invisible Woman, Human Torch, The Thing.

Defenders: Daredevil, Iron Fist, Luke Cage, Jessica Jones, Silver Surfer, Ghost Rider, Misty Knight, The Punisher, Moon Knight, Elektra.

Commands:

  • Type "***challenging battle***" and the AI will make your current foe a formidable opponent for you.

  • Type "***detailed scene***" and the AI will describe the next scene with vivid, realistic details, whether it's sexual, dramatic, gory, or anything else.

  • Type "***scenario***" and the AI will describe the place you find yourself in

  • Type "***appearance***" and the AI will describe the character's appearance.

  • Type "***short response***" and the AI will give a brief, concise response.

  • Type "***character perspective***" and the AI will respond from the character's point of view. Works even better if you specify the characters, Like ***Iron Man's perspective*** or ***Iron Man, Thor and Hulk's perspective***. Useful if the AI starts to talk and act for you.

    • Tips on How to Play This Game:

      • The instructions above are for you to type under your message. For example, when replying to the bot with "I am {{user}}," you can type the commands at your will, like:

      "Hi, I am {{user}}"

      "***Character Perspective***"

      Or actions such as:

      "*I punch Thor in the face*"

      "***Challenging Battle***"

      • Of course, you can write much longer texts, but the premise remains the same.

      • The more details you provide about your powers, starting point, background, and identity at the beginning of the game, the better the AI will understand and create a more immersive experience. If you don’t want the heroes to immediately perceive you as a threat, specify that you are still anonymous at the starting point.

      • Unfortunately, the AI may occasionally speak for you. This is a known AI issue. To counteract this, try starting the game by interacting with a character, especially by asking them questions. Additionally, using the "***Character Perspective***" command may help, but it’s not guaranteed.

      • Be creative and explore the depths of your imagination! I highly encourage you to research the vast universe of Marvel Comics. You can start as a custom or existing villain, or even as a hero who turns evil. Choose any city, country, society, or planet, with any power and background. The only limit is your imagination.

    See also:

  • Against The Justice League!<
creator: VICTOR_
